rows.label: tlk70000059_02_msg0001
rows.name:
How goes it, darlings? Been
keeping an eye on your elements?

rows.label: tlk70000059_02_msg0002
rows.name:
Don't get careless when ahead.
Some enemies fly into a rage
after taking enough damage.

rows.label: tlk70000059_02_msg0003
rows.name:
Monsters aren't so different to humans
in that regard. When we're backed into
a corner, we can really go ballistic!
